context: Trabeculae:   coarse Papillary muscles:   attached to interventricular septum + free wall; apical moderator band Differentiating features of RV (from LV): Moderator Band =  muscular band extending from interventricular septum to base of anterior papillary muscle Function:   part of right bundle branch conduction system Right Ventricular Outflow Tract (RVOT) =  smooth muscular infundibulum / conus inferior to PV In the right ventricle, trabeculae are coarse, and presence of an apical moderator band is
